multi_step: The task is to find an op-amp output voltage from a circuit, which typically requires applying ideal op-amp conditions together with circuit relationships

Score kept moderate because the actual circuit details are not available in the text fields, so complexity cannot be confirmed directly
verifiability: The provided answer '6V' matches one of the explicit multiple-choice options (B)
A numeric voltage answer is straightforward for downstream checking against a worked circuit solution
